programmes.show_description: Louisville, KY. Casey Webb is in Louisville, Kentucky, for epic eats including a booze-infused Southern staple and a spicy popcorn and frozen hot chocolate challenge in Indiana. S2, Ep3
Charleston. Adam Richman heads to Charleston, South Carolina for oysters served by the shovel, a fried chicken sandwich smothered in sausage gravy, and a spicy tuna sushi challenge. S2, Ep4
All Kinds Of Barbecue. Guy takes a southern swing to check out different styles of barbecue, including sweet ribs in Mississippi and tangy pulled pork in New Orleans. S3, Ep12
Diners-A-Plenty. Guy Fieri tries a diner in South Carolina where the specialty is the A-Plenty, a meal or sandwich covered in French fries and onion rings. S1, Ep11
Diggerland, Dol And Dresses. Mauro makes a Korean-themed first birthday cake, Madeline picks a dress for her wedding anniversary. And, Buddy creates a cake for a digger theme park! S9, Ep5
Go Fly A Kite. Buddy judges a true 'clash-of-the-titans' - a cook-off between local police and fire-fighters, complete with two fabulous cakes to celebrate the event! S9, Ep6

Rick Stein goes on a pigeon shoot in Cornwall, inspiring him to cook pigeon and peas. Plus, after visiting Devon, he makes a warm skate salad. S1, Ep1
Rick Stein cooks sautéed chicken with 40 cloves of garlic and a warm pheasant salad. Plus, he learns how cider is made at an old-fashioned cider farm in Somerset. S1, Ep2
Mainland France. The bikers begin in Marseille, one of the largest ports in the Mediterranean. There, they sample bourride, a delicious fish stew. S1, Ep4
Ask Me Anything Wildcard. Ree Drummond answers questions from friends, townsfolk and visitors to Pawhuska. She shares her ribeye banh mi Vietnamese sandwich plus other tasty recipes. S24, Ep12
Fire And Feast. Ree Drummond cooks a spring feast while Ladd and the cowboys are busy on the ranch. She makes pork tenderloin with herby mustard cream and mac and cheese primavera. S24, Ep13
Jamie Oliver cooks a super-speedy smoked salmon pasta, a loaded beef burger with sweet red peppers, pickles and mustard, and toffee apple buns. S1, Ep7
Jamie cooks an aubergine burger, a sesame-seared salmon supper, and a chickpea and squash casserole that can be turned into a host of tasty dishes. S1, Ep8
Dare To Be Different. Ina adapts classic dishes by adding new flavours and altering the cooking method. She makes an easy Parmesan risotto and deconstructed strawberry shortcakes. S6, Ep5
Modern Comfort. Ina makes classic comfort foods. Her friend, Mary Giuliani, helps Ina to make miniature grilled cheese sandwich canapés, French toast pudding and a seafood pot pie. S6, Ep6
Cake. The bakers face judges Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry and are asked to produce sandwich cakes, angel food cake and amazing chocolate creations. S4, Ep1
Bread. The surviving bakers face judges Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry and are asked to produce bread sticks, English muffins and a variety of loaves. S4, Ep2
James heads to the Languedoc, known as the heart of authentic France. He's treated to mouth-watering cassoulet and discovers delicious local ingredients. S1, Ep3
James enjoys the picturesque views and delicious food in Charente. He uses Cognac for his first al fresco cook and makes a classic French onion soup. S1, Ep4
Mainland France. The bikers begin in Marseille, one of the largest ports in the Mediterranean. There, they sample bourride, a delicious fish stew. S1, Ep4

With the rising cost of food and energy, Jamie Oliver is on a mission to make delicious dishes that won't break the budget. S1, Ep1
The Ultimate Burger. Jamie Oliver takes the UK's favourite cuisine to the next level. The chef shows how to make his ultimate burger with his friend, DJ BBQ. S1, Ep1
Jamie Oliver masters Bolognese ravioli. Plus, he recreates the UK's favourite dish, chicken tikka masala - with a secret ingredient. S1, Ep2
Eastern Southern. Guy Fieri heads east to get a taste of the South. He checks out meatloaf in New Hampshire, extra-spicy shrimp in North Carolina and seafood stew in Florida. S36, Ep3
Beef And Bird. Guy Fieri loads up the meat! In New Hampshire, a funky joint puts Thai in their tacos, and a local gem in North Carolina fires up monster barbecue. S36, Ep5
Nashville. Adam's culinary crusade brings him to Nashville, Tennessee. He tries to guide two of the city's newest stars, the LoCash Cowboys, through the Rooster Challenge. S1, Ep4
Burger Bonanza. Adam travels to North Carolina to try a 20-ounce bacon double-cheeseburger. Later, he is given one hour to finish off the spiciest burger in Texas. S1, Ep15
Neighborhood Favorites. Guy finds places regulars flock to. In Santa Fe, NM, a little cafe serves El Salvadoran specialties. In Mississippi a joint on stilts makes Creole dishes. S5, Ep7
Sauced And Spiced. Guy is looking for big flavour. In Tennessee he visits a place serving lamb with Syrian spiced tomato sauce. In Minnesota a café serves wild rice French toast. S10, Ep6
Viking Ships And Ice Cream Cones. Buddy makes a Viking-themed cake for the crew of a Viking ship to celebrate the end of their voyage. Plus, a multi-flavoured ice-cream cone cake! S9, Ep7
Mermaids, Promotions And Puppy Love. Buddy makes a mermaid cake for an aquarium hosting 'mermaids' who swim in the tanks. Plus, Mauro makes a law-abiding cake for a police pal! S9, Ep8

With the rising cost of food and energy, Jamie Oliver is on a mission to make delicious dishes that won't break the budget. S1, Ep1
Balearics. The bikers visit Minorca and Majorca to devour tasty local produce. They try cuttlefish stew and ensaimadas with almond filling. S1, Ep5
Quick And Easy: Kid-Approved. Ree Drummond shares kid-approved recipes that are quick and easy to make. They include waffle fry sliders and parmesan fish sticks. S23, Ep1
Quick And Easy: One Pan. Ree Drummond makes quick and easy one-pan meals. Dishes include sheet pan curried chicken and crunchy turkey taco lettuce wraps. S23, Ep2
The Aeolian Islands. Jamie begins his Italian adventure in the awe-inspiring Aeolian Islands. He cooks a delicious chicken and eggplant pot roast with lemony couscous. S1, Ep1
Puglia. Jamie travels to Puglia to find the family recipes that make this region the hottest food destination in Italy. Plus, he cooks homemade pasta with broccoli and tangy pesto. S1, Ep2
Jeffrey's Birthday Pop-Up. Ina throws Jeffrey a surprise birthday party. On the menu for the celebration is a Greek platter, spinach pie and a delicious raspberry and orange trifle. S6, Ep7
Brunch Bunch. Ina enlists the help of a local florist and photographer to create the perfect brunch setup. In the kitchen, she makes baked blintzes with fresh blueberry sauce. S6, Ep8
Desserts. It's round three, and the heat in the kitchen is rising with a burglary in the Bake Off tent, as the remaining 11 bakers get ready to deal with desserts. S4, Ep3
Pies & Tarts. It's the fourth round and the baking is getting serious as the remaining bakers don their pinnies to pimp up pies and tarts. They must create an age-old custard tart. S4, Ep4
James visits the Dordogne, known for its hearty cuisine. He tastes three local specialities and seeks out the region's local icon, black truffle! S1, Ep5
James travels to Lyon to explore two sides of the culinary scene. He visits the city's famous food market and experiences fine-dining at Michelin-starred restaurants. S1, Ep6
Balearics. The bikers visit Minorca and Majorca to devour tasty local produce. They try cuttlefish stew and ensaimadas with almond filling. S1, Ep5

Munich. Paul Hollywood is in Munich to discover traditional German baking. He learns the secret behind Munich's pretzels, he tries Baumkuchen and makes a dampfnudel dessert. S1, Ep10
Best Of Bakes. From babka and Caprese cake to empanada pie and cheesecake brownie, Paul Hollywood looks back over some of his favourite City Bakes he created on his visits. S1, Ep11
With the rising cost of food and energy, Jamie Oliver is on a mission to make delicious dishes that won't break the budget. S1, Ep1
Hometown Inspiration. Guy Fieri heads to Portland, Oregon, to visit a spot putting a vegan spin on Israeli flavours. Plus, Louisiana specialities are on the menu in Logan, Utah. S31, Ep11
Beef, Lamb And Pig. Guy Fieri hunts down meaty favourites in Kentucky and North Carolina. He enjoys an Irish pub's cottage pie, Asian-barbecue fusion and pimento-topped burgers. S26, Ep5
